command.description: A single allow-listed program invocation, run with shell:false. No shell features (&&, ;, |, redirects, globs, $(), backticks). The first token must be an allow-listed executable (node, npm, vitest, pytest, ...). For unit/integration/e2e checks using `node --test`, the command must reference a real test file and any --test-name-pattern must match the covered criterion id.
